docs.title: Using Icon Packages
docs.text: django-iconx works with any SVG icon set. Point your ICONX config at a directory of .svg files and run iconx_generate.

docs.title: Lucide
docs.text:
Lucide is a community-maintained fork of Feather Icons with 1500+ icons.

npm install lucide-static

Then symlink or copy the icons into your static directory:

mkdir -p static/icons
ln -s ../../node_modules/lucide-static/icons static/icons/lucide

STATICFILES_DIRS = [BASE_DIR / "static"]

ICONX = {
    "sets": [
        {"path": "icons/lucide/"},
    ],
}

python manage.py iconx_generate

This gives you classes like icon-search, icon-arrow-left, icon-check, etc.

docs.title: Heroicons
docs.text:
Heroicons by the Tailwind team provides outline, solid, and mini variants.

npm install heroicons

mkdir -p static/icons
ln -s ../../node_modules/heroicons/24/outline static/icons/heroicons

ICONX = {
    "sets": [
        {"path": "icons/heroicons/", "prefix": "hero"},
    ],
}

Icons are available as icon-hero-arrow-left, icon-hero-check, etc. Use the prefix to avoid name collisions if you use multiple icon sets.

docs.title: Multiple icon sets
docs.text:
You can combine icon sets and assign each a prefix:

ICONX = {
    "sets": [
        {"path": "icons/lucide/"},
        {"path": "icons/heroicons/", "prefix": "hero"},
        {"path": "icons/custom/", "prefix": "custom", "color": "original"},
    ],
}
  • Icons without a prefix use the icon name directly: icon-search
  • Prefixed icons get the prefix prepended: icon-hero-search, icon-custom-logo
  • Use "color": "original" for multi-color SVGs that should preserve their fill colors

docs.title: Any SVG directory
docs.text:
django-iconx doesn't care where the SVGs come from. You can:

  • Install an npm package and symlink its icons directory
  • Download SVGs manually into your static directory
  • Use your own custom SVGs
  • Mix and match any of the above

The only requirement is that the SVGs are reachable from a directory listed in STATICFILES_DIRS, and that the sets paths match.
